name: Duck Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the ducks and pat dry inside and out. Cook in water to cover in a large saucepan until tender, then drain reserving 2 quarts of the broth. Bone the ducks.
2. Melt the butter or margarine in a skillet and add the flour, cooking until dark brown; stirring constantly.
3. Add the duck meat and the remaining ingredients and seasonings, and cook over low heat for 2 hours or until desired consistency, stirring frequently.
4. Serve over cooked rice or noodles.
